error.validationOccurred: One or more validation errors occurred.
error.notFound: The requested record was not found.
err.branding.logoTooLarge: The logo can be at most 2 MB.
err.branding.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Upload PNG, JPEG, SVG, WEBP or GIF.
err.forbidden.record: You do not have permission to act on this record.
err.forbidden.environment: You do not have permission to view this environment.
err.forbidden.productEnvironments: You do not have permission to view this product's environments.
err.forbidden.customer: You do not have permission to view this customer.
err.forbidden.product: You do not have permission to view this product.
err.grant.scopeFieldsRequired: ScopeType, ScopeId and Level are required for a scope grant.
err.grant.capabilityRequired: Capability is required for a capability grant.
err.customer.churnedDateRequired: Service end date is required for the Churned status.
err.customer.productAlreadyAdded: The product is already added to this customer.
err.auth.noPlatformAccess: The account does not have platform access.
err.auth.accountLocked: The account is locked. Contact an administrator.
err.auth.passwordNotChangeable: This account's password cannot be changed.
err.credential.targetRequired: EnvironmentResourceId, SharedResourceId or EndpointUrlId must be provided.
err.credential.forbiddenEdit: You do not have permission to edit this resource's details.
err.credential.forbiddenView: You do not have permission to view this credential.
err.credential.forbiddenDelete: You do not have permission to delete this resource's details.
err.personalCredential.targetRequired: EnvironmentResourceId or SharedResourceId must be specified.
err.personalCredential.notOwner: This personal credential does not belong to you.
err.personalCredential.forbiddenDelete: You do not have permission to delete this personal credential.
err.person.notPlatformUser: The person is not a platform user.
err.person.terminationDateRequired: Termination date is required when the status is Terminated or Resigned.
err.person.alreadyPlatformUser: This person is already a platform user.
err.person.emailRequiredForPlatform: The person must have an email address to become a platform user.
err.person.notPlatformUserAlready: This person is already not a platform user.
err.product.teamAlreadyAssigned: The team is already assigned to this product.
err.product.personAlreadyAssigned: The person already has an active assignment on this product.
err.customField.alreadyDefined: A field is already defined for '{1}' with the key '{0}'.
err.customer.codeExists: A customer with the code '{0}' already exists.
err.customerProduct.hasEnvironments: This product has {0} environments. Remove the environments first.
err.environment.hasResources: This environment has {0} resources. Remove the resources first.
err.hostingPlatform.inUse: {0} environments are bound to this platform. Change their platform first.
err.environmentType.inUse: {0} environment records are bound to this environment type. Delete them first.
err.resourceTemplate.inUse: This resource template is used in {0} environments. Remove the resources in those environments first.
err.environmentType.notActive: The environment type '{0}' is not active.
err.role.alreadyAssigned: The person already has the role '{0}'.
err.person.emailInUse: The email address '{0}' is already in use.
err.smtp.noActiveAccount: No active email account is configured. Add one from Mail Settings.
err.smtp.timeout: The SMTP connection timed out ({0}:{1}). The server/port may be wrong (SMTP is usually 587/STARTTLS or 465/SSL — 443 is not SMTP) or access is blocked.
err.smtp.connectFailed: Could not connect to the SMTP server ({0}:{1}). The server address/port may be wrong or access is blocked. ({2})
err.smtp.tlsError: TLS/SSL handshake error ({0}:{1}). Check the security setting and port (STARTTLS→587, SSL→465).
err.smtp.authFailed: Authentication failed: incorrect username or password (SMTP AUTH may be disabled in O365 / an app password is required with MFA).
err.smtp.rejected: The SMTP server rejected the request: {0}
err.smtp.protocolError: SMTP protocol error: {0} (you may be connecting to the wrong port).
val.credential.targetRequired: EnvironmentResourceId, SharedResourceId or EndpointUrlId must be provided.
val.personalCredential.targetRequired: EnvironmentResourceId or SharedResourceId must be specified.
val.password.minLength: The new password must be at least 8 characters.
val.password.mustDiffer: The new password must be different from the current password.
val.password.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
val.password.number: Password must contain at least one number.
val.customField.fieldKeyFormat: Field key may contain lowercase letters, digits and underscores, and must start with a letter.
val.customField.selectOptionsRequired: Option list is required for Select-type fields.
val.team.teamType: Team type must be Domain, Project, or Platform.
val.url.base: Base URL must be a valid URL.
val.url.swagger: Swagger URL must be a valid URL.
val.url.health: Health Check URL must be a valid URL.
val.resource.sharedRequired: SharedResourceId is required when IsShared is true.
val.envType.codeFormat: Code must be uppercase letters, digits, or underscores.
val.color.hex: Color must be a valid hex code (e.g. #FF0000).
val.sharedResource.scope: Environment scope must be one of: Dev, Test, Prod, All.
val.product.codeFormat: Code must contain only uppercase letters, digits, hyphens, and underscores.
val.cf.email: '{0}' must be a valid email address.
val.cf.regex: '{0}' does not match the expected format.
email.footer: This email was sent automatically by KYS.
email.securityNote: For your security, we recommend changing your password after your first sign-in.
email.welcome.subject: Your KYS Platform Account
email.welcome.heading: Welcome to the KYS Platform
email.welcome.intro: A platform account has been created for you on the Enterprise Software Management System (KYS). You can sign in with the details below.
email.reset.subject: KYS — Your Password Has Been Reset
email.reset.heading: Your Password Has Been Reset
email.reset.intro: The password for your KYS platform account has been reset by an administrator. Your new sign-in details are below.
email.reset.securityNote: For your security, we recommend changing your password after your first sign-in. If you did not request this, contact your administrator.
email.test.subject: KYS — Test Email
email.test.heading: KYS — Test Email
email.test.body: This is a test email. If you received this message, your SMTP configuration is working correctly. ✅
